name: Forella Group
message: Forella is a Minority Business Enterprise (MBE) that offers a range of services including cost estimating analyses, CPM P6 schedule management, constructability reviews, and project management. They specialize in expert investigations and dispute resolution, providing construction economics services to their clients.We will upload 457gb of corporate data soon. Detailed employee personal information (SSNs, passports, DLs, health information, credit cards and so on), financials, NDAs, contracts and agreements,confidential projects, etc.
